core_mechanism: convex/affine interpolation between two fixed points in a high-dimensional parameter space, where a separate scalar mixing coefficient is assigned per coordinate-block and those coefficients are fitted to optimize a criterion on a small held-out calibration sample
brief_reason: The abstract describes composing two frozen source checkpoints by fitting, per aligned parameter tensor, one scalar interpolation coefficient on a small exemplar memory to materialize a single interpolated checkpoint, which is exactly a piecewise linear blend of two endpoints in parameter space with calibration-tuned mixing weights.
